---
pagetitle: "Eesha Jagdhane"
---

```{=html}
<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="brand">EJ.</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="experience.html">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="hobbies.html">Hobbies</a></li>
      <li><a href="insights.html">Insights</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="contact.html" class="btn-dark">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<main>
<div class="wrap">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero reveal">
    <div class="card card-tan hero-main">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Data · Business · AI</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Turning data into <em>insights</em>, and insights into impact.</h1>
      <p class="hero-intro">
        I'm Eesha — an MS Business Analytics student at UC San Diego, using data to
        improve reporting, streamline workflows, and turn complex information into
        clear, practical decisions for teams in Tech, FinTech, and beyond.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="portrait">
      <img src="Pictures/Picture3.jpeg" alt="Eesha Jagdhane">
      <p class="portrait-quote">"Data is only useful when it changes what someone decides next."</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT BAR -->
  <section class="contactbar reveal">
    <div class="contactbar-title">Let's build something <em>meaningful.</em></div>
    <div class="contactbar-links">
      <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com">→ Email</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" target="_blank" rel="noopener">→ LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" target="_blank" rel="noopener">→ GitHub</a>
      <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">→ Download resume</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- AT A GLANCE + SELECTED PATH -->
  <section class="grid-2 grid-glance reveal">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><span class="eyebrow">At a glance</span></div>
      <div class="glance-row"><span class="glance-label">Currently</span><span class="glance-value">MS Business Analytics @ UCSD</span></div>
      <div class="glance-row"><span class="glance-label">Interests</span><span class="glance-value">Tech · FinTech · AI</span></div>
      <div class="glance-row"><span class="glance-label">Roles</span><span class="glance-value">Data / Business Analyst · AI Engineer</span></div>
      <div class="glance-row"><span class="glance-label">Status</span><span class="glance-value">Open to full-time roles</span></div>
    </div>

    <a href="experience.html" class="card card-link">
      <div class="card-head">
        <span class="eyebrow">Selected path</span>
        <span class="arrow-link">View all →</span>
      </div>
      <div class="path-item">
        <div class="path-when">2026</div>
        <div>
          <div class="path-title">AI Engineer — Dhauz | QuantumRise</div>
          <div class="path-desc">Earned third place in the UC San Diego Rady TRACE Capstone Awards for developing a healthcare AI chatbot prototype for patient-deterioration monitoring.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="path-item">
        <div class="path-when">2023 — 2025</div>
        <div>
          <div class="path-title">Data Analyst — Morningstar DBRS</div>
          <div class="path-desc">Automated financial reporting, optimized processes, and improved data reliability across teams.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="path-item">
        <div class="path-when">2022 — 2023</div>
        <div>
          <div class="path-title">Credit Ratings Analyst — Morningstar DBRS</div>
          <div class="path-desc">Ran 15+ cash-flow and scenario analyses with 99% model accuracy.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="path-item">
        <div class="path-when">2021</div>
        <div>
          <div class="path-title">Machine Learning Intern — CDAC</div>
          <div class="path-desc">Built an incremental-learning image model reaching 98.1% test accuracy.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>
  </section>

  <!-- COGNITIVE STACK + HOBBIES -->
  <section class="grid-2 grid-stack reveal">
    <div class="card card-tan">
      <div class="card-head"><span class="eyebrow">Cognitive stack</span></div>
      <div class="chips">
        <span class="chip">Python</span>
        <span class="chip">SQL</span>
        <span class="chip">Tableau</span>
        <span class="chip">Excel</span>
        <span class="chip">Scikit-Learn</span>
        <span class="chip">TensorFlow</span>
        <span class="chip">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="chip">Statistical Analysis</span>
        <span class="chip">Exploratory Data Analysis</span>
        <span class="chip">Process Improvement</span>
        <span class="chip">Stakeholder Communication</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="hobbies.html" class="card card-tan card-link">
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <div class="teaser-title">Hobbies &amp; curiosities</div>
      <div class="eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">The interests that shape how I think</div>
      <span class="arrow-link">Explore →</span>
    </a>
  </section>

  <!-- LATEST INSIGHT + FEATURED -->
  <section class="grid-2 grid-feature reveal">
    <a href="insights.html" class="card card-link">
      <div class="card-head"><span class="eyebrow">Latest insight</span></div>
      <div class="teaser-title">Notes on analytics, AI, and building a career in tech.</div>
      <div class="teaser-desc">Short essays on what I'm learning at UCSD and how I think about data problems in the wild.</div>
      <span class="arrow-link">Read insights →</span>
    </a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="card card-dark card-link">
      <div class="card-head"><span class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--ink-mute);">Featured</span></div>
      <div class="teaser-title">Project spotlights coming soon.</div>
      <div class="teaser-desc">GitHub repos and Tableau dashboards, framed as case studies.</div>
      <span class="arrow-link">See projects →</span>
    </a>
  </section>

</div>
</main>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>Based in San Diego, CA · UCSD MS Business Analytics</span>
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
    </div>
    <span>© 2026 Eesha Jagdhane</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.08 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>
```
